title: Agent Flow Specification
description: Schema for defining hybrid agent flows that support deterministic and AI-driven execution across multiple platforms.

client_id.description: Identity of this agent to all platform services. Used for auth, rate limiting, audit, and cost attribution.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining what the process receives as input.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining what the process produces as output.

edges.description: Transitions between nodes, including conditional routing.

definitions.description: Named reusable components (sub-flows and single-step operations). Each key is a definition ID.

determinism.description: Design-time declaration of the process's autonomy level.

Node.description: An activity in the process graph.

$ref.description: External definition reference (URI or relative path). When present, the referenced file provides the node body.

task_type.description: Kind of task work. Required when activity_type is 'task'.

config.description: Runtime-invariant parameters for this node. Shape depends on activity_type and task_type.

mode.description: Execution mode — how much autonomy the executor has.

inputs.description: State keys this node reads (key list) or input contract (JSON Schema for definitions).

outputs.description: State keys this node writes (key list) or output contract (JSON Schema for definitions).

context.description: Scope configuration for select or subprocess modes.

constraints.description: Execution boundaries: timeouts, retries, cost/token limits, guardrails.

Mode.description: Execution mode. A string ('fixed' or 'none') when no configuration is needed, or an object for 'select' mode.

oneOf.description: 'fixed': node executes exactly what its config describes. 'none': decision node, routing logic on edges.

SelectMode.description: AI-driven selection from a set of options.

instruction.description: System prompt for the selecting LLM.

options.description: Available choices. Each references a definition.

exit_condition.description: Natural language or expression describing when to stop iterating.

SelectOption.description: A selectable option within a select mode.

ref.description: ID of a definition in the definitions section.

description.description: Shown to the LLM during selection.

precondition.description: Deterministic filter. If false, option is excluded from the menu.

condition.description: Routing condition for decision node outbound edges.

EdgeCondition.description: A routing condition on an edge. Either an expression or a default fallback.

expression.description: Expression evaluated using the process-level expression_language.

default.description: This edge is taken if no other condition matches.

Definition.description: A reusable component: either a full inline definition or an external reference.

InlineDefinition.description: A named reusable sub-flow with an interface contract.

description.description: Human-readable description. Shown to LLMs during selection.

inputs.description: JSON Schema for the definition's input contract.

outputs.description: JSON Schema for the definition's output contract.

context.description: Scope configuration for this definition's execution.

edges.description: Transitions within the definition. Use __start__ and __end__ as entry/exit pseudo-nodes.

ExternalRef.description: Reference to an external definition file.

$ref.description: URI or relative path to the external definition file.

Context.description: Scope configuration. Full parent inheritance is the default.

limit_to.description: Restricts which parent keys are visible. If absent, full parent context is inherited.

outputs.description: Keys that merge back to parent when scope closes.

Constraints.description: Execution boundaries applicable to any node.

max_retries.description: Number of retry attempts on transient failure.

retry_backoff_seconds.description: Backoff schedule for retries. Array length should match max_retries.

cost_limit_usd.description: Maximum spend on LLM calls for AI-driven nodes.

token_limit.description: Maximum token consumption across LLM calls for AI-driven nodes.

guardrails.description: Content filters and custom validation rules. Primarily for AI-driven nodes.

Guardrail.description: A guardrail check applied to node execution.

expression.description: Validation expression for custom type guardrails. Evaluated using the process-level expression_language.

ErrorHandler.description: Routes a specific error type to an action.

error_type.description: Error type from the platform's error taxonomy.

action.description: What to do when this error occurs.

target.description: Target node ID. Required when action is 'route'.

max_attempts.description: Override for the node's max_retries for this specific error type. Used with 'retry' action.

Expression.description: A deterministic expression evaluated using the process-level expression_language.

Bindings.description: Platform component mappings. Can be separated into its own file.

runtime_version.description: Abstracted version of the orchestration runtime.

expression_language.description: Default language for inline expressions in the process model (edge conditions, preconditions, guardrails). Evaluated by the orchestrator.

components.description: Maps task types and activity types to platform services.

ComponentBinding.description: Maps a task type to a specific platform service.

target_version.description: Abstracted version of the target platform.

config.description: Business-logic parameters the process author controls. Platform infrastructure details are not exposed here.

NodeInputsOutputs.description: Either a simple key list (for nodes within a known schema) or a full JSON Schema (for definition contracts).

oneOf.description: Simple key list referencing state properties.
Full JSON Schema for interface validation.

JsonSchema.description: A standard JSON Schema object. Accepts any valid JSON Schema properties.

RestCallConfig.description: Configuration schema for rest_call task type.

input_mapping.description: Maps state values to request parameters. Keys use dot notation for nesting (e.g., 'body.items', 'query.customer_id').

output_mapping.description: Maps response values to state keys.

GrpcCallConfig.description: Configuration schema for grpc_call task type.

input_mapping.description: Maps state values to request fields.

output_mapping.description: Maps response fields to state keys.

NotificationConfig.description: Configuration schema for notification task type.

recipient_mapping.description: JSONPath expression resolving to the recipient address.

params_mapping.description: Maps state values to template parameters.

EventPublishConfig.description: Configuration schema for event_publish task type.

payload_mapping.description: Maps state values to event payload fields.

ScriptConfig.description: Configuration schema for script task type.

InvokeAgentConfig.description: Configuration schema for invoke_agent task type.

agent_ref.description: Reference to another agent definition (URI or relative path).

input_mapping.description: Maps state values to agent input.

output_mapping.description: Maps agent output to state keys.

LlmPromptConfig.description: Configuration schema for llm_prompt activity type.

model.description: LLM model identifier. The platform routes to the appropriate provider.

input_mapping.description: Maps state values to template variables.

output_key.description: State key where the LLM response is written.

output_schema.description: Expected schema of the LLM output. Used for validation and structured output.

EventWaitConfig.description: Configuration schema for event_wait activity type.

correlation_key.description: JSONPath expression for correlating incoming events to this instance.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait time before timing out.

UserInteractionConfig.description: Configuration schema for user_interaction activity type.

form.description: Form identifier in the task management system.

instructions.description: Instructions shown to the human user.

input_mapping.description: Maps state values to form fields.

output_mapping.description: Maps form submission to state keys.
